entryPointCandidates.name: App.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Root application component that wires up React Router with the dashboard layout shell, theme provider, and lazy-loaded routes for every module (elections, Bundestag, legislation, EU law, world map, lobby register, etc.).

entryPointCandidates.name: README.md
entryPointCandidates.summary: Primary project documentation (in German) covering the tech stack, all SPA routes/pages, the design system, API conventions, and the local development and deploy workflow for the Res.Publica Dashboard.

entryPointCandidates.name: main.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Application bootstrap entry that mounts the App component into the DOM root with React StrictMode and loads global CSS.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Barrel module that re-exports the entire design system: theme context, charts, and all reusable UI components plus their prop types for convenient single-source imports.

entryPointCandidates.name: MapMode.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Map-centric election view orchestrating the choropleth map, metric/type selectors, district search, and the advanced analysis tabs.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Primary project documentation (in German) covering the tech stack, all SPA routes/pages, the design system, API conventions, and the local development and deploy workflow for the Res.Publica Dashboard.

documentation.name: BUG8-gesetz-titel-TODO.md
documentation.summary: Developer TODO note documenting a UX bug where the legislation list view shows raw file identifiers instead of human-readable display titles, with the open decision and implementation steps.

infrastructure.name: ci.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow triggered on push to main and on every pull request, running TypeScript typecheck, production build, and lint as quality gates.

infrastructure.name: build
infrastructure.summary: The 'Typecheck, build, lint' job on ubuntu-latest: checks out the repo, sets up Node 20, installs dependencies with npm ci, runs the production build, then runs lint informationally.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: NPM manifest defining the dev/build/lint/preview scripts and pinning runtime dependencies (React, react-router-dom, d3, recharts, maplibre-gl) and the TypeScript/Vite/ESLint dev toolchain.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: Root TypeScript solution-style config that holds no files of its own and delegates to the tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json project references.

config.name: tsconfig.app.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the application source under src/, enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution, react-jsx, and ES2020 target with DOM libs.

config.name: tsconfig.node.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration scoped to the Node-side build tooling (vite.config.ts), targeting ES2022 with strict linting and bundler module resolution.

config.name: config.json
config.summary: Minimal configuration for the Understand-Anything plugin, setting the output language for generated analysis content.

list.name: Application Shell & Routing
list.description: Bootstraps the SPA and wires React Router: the root App component with lazy-loaded module routes, the main.tsx mount point, the DashboardLayout shell, and global base CSS.

list.name: Feature Pages & Components
list.description: Route-level pages (Bundestag, Elections, Legislation, EU Law, World Map, Lobby Register, Overview, Sources) plus their feature-specific components, charts, maps, and colocated helpers/types for the German/EU political modules.

list.name: Design System
list.description: The reusable component library and theming foundation: design tokens, the ThemeContext (light/dark + DE/EN i18n), the per-feature i18n dictionaries, and shared UI primitives, charts, navigation, and layout components.

list.name: Hooks & Data Access
list.description: Custom React hooks encapsulating shared stateful logic and the public Node API client, including useApi for data fetching plus localStorage, debounce, media-query, pagination, and URL-param state hooks.

list.name: Static Data & Assets
list.description: Static datasets and pure data utilities consumed by the visualizations: Bundestag seat geometry, the sources catalog, world GeoJSON, world-map filter predicates, and standalone UI-kit prototypes.

list.name: Configuration & Build
list.description: Project configuration and build tooling: package.json, the TypeScript project configs, the Vite and ESLint configs, Vite ambient type declarations, and AI/tooling config files.

list.name: Infrastructure & CI/CD
list.description: Deployment and continuous-integration assets: the GitHub Actions workflow that typechecks, builds, and lints, plus the Nginx-targeted production deploy script.

list.name: Documentation
list.description: Project documentation including the German README covering stack, routes, and deploy workflow, and developer TODO/bug notes.

file:src/design-system/components/Projec.name: ProjectionToggle.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Projec.summary: Segmented toggle for switching the world map between projection modes, with disabled-state messaging.

file:src/design-system/components/RadarC.name: RadarChart.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/RadarC.summary: SVG radar/spider chart rendering a single polygon over multiple labelled axes with grid rings.

file:src/design-system/components/Sectio.name: SectionDivider.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Sectio.summary: Labelled horizontal section divider used to separate content groups within a page.

file:src/design-system/components/ShareC.name: ShareCompact.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/ShareC.summary: Compact share widget offering quick links to share the current page to social platforms plus copy-to-clipboard.

file:src/design-system/components/ShareT.name: ShareToolbar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/ShareT.summary: Full share toolbar exposing native Web Share, social platform links, and copy-to-clipboard for the current page.

file:src/design-system/components/Sideba.name: Sidebar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Sideba.summary: Desktop collapsible sidebar navigation with grouped module entries, theme/language controls, and embedded share widget.

file:src/design-system/components/Sparkl.name: Sparkline.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Sparkl.summary: Minimal inline SVG sparkline rendering a numeric series as a single trend line with optional min/max markers.

file:src/design-system/components/Stacke.name: StackedAreaChart.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Stacke.summary: SVG stacked area chart layering import and export trade volumes over time with hover tooltips.

file:src/design-system/components/StatTi.name: StatTile.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/StatTi.summary: Compact statistic tile displaying a label, primary value, optional sub-text, and icon.

file:src/design-system/components/StatWi.name: StatWidget.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/StatWi.summary: Statistic widget variant displaying a label, value, sub-text, and icon, with an optional fluid (full-width) layout.

file:src/design-system/components/TradeB.name: TradeBalance.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/TradeB.summary: Trade balance summary block comparing total exports and imports and rendering a localized surplus/deficit verdict.

file:src/design-system/components/TrendA.name: TrendArrow.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/TrendA.summary: Directional trend arrow indicating up/down/flat movement of a value, plus a helper to derive trend direction from two values.

file:src/design-system/components/ViewTo.name: ViewToggle.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/ViewTo.summary: Generic segmented view toggle for switching between mutually exclusive display options.

file:src/design-system/components/VoteBa.name: VoteBar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/VoteBa.summary: Bundestag vote breakdown bar showing yes/no/abstain/absent proportions for a faction with an expandable detail panel.

file:src/design-system/hsSections.ts.name: hsSections.ts
file:src/design-system/hsSections.ts.summary: Static lookup tables mapping HS commodity section codes to German and English human-readable labels.

file:src/design-system/tokens.ts.name: tokens.ts
file:src/design-system/tokens.ts.summary: Design-system token definitions: light and dark color palettes plus shared spacing, font, and breakpoint scales consumed across all components.

file:src/design-system/ThemeContext.tsx.name: ThemeContext.tsx
file:src/design-system/ThemeContext.tsx.summary: React context provider for the design system that manages light/dark theme and DE/EN language state, persisting both to localStorage and exposing a theme palette, spacing tokens, and a translation function.

file:src/design-system/components/Badge..name: Badge.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Badge..summary: Themed inline badge/pill component rendering short status text in one of several semantic color variants.

file:src/design-system/components/Balanc.name: BalanceBarChart.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Balanc.summary: SVG trade-balance bar chart that plots yearly export/import net balance with hover interaction and localized currency formatting.

file:src/design-system/components/DataCa.name: DataCard.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/DataCa.summary: Generic themed card container with optional header, footer, and clickable/active states used to wrap dashboard content blocks.

file:src/design-system/components/EmptyS.name: EmptyState.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/EmptyS.summary: Themed placeholder shown when a data view has no results, optionally rendering a call-to-action element.

file:src/design-system/components/Filter.name: FilterToolbar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Filter.summary: Reusable filter/search toolbar that renders a text search field plus a set of declarative select filters for list pages.

file:src/design-system/components/HBar.t.name: HBar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/HBar.t.summary: Horizontal bar component that visualizes a single value relative to a max, with label, formatted value, and optional icon.

file:src/design-system/components/HSSect.name: HSSectionBreakdown.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/HSSect.summary: Trade breakdown widget that ranks HS commodity sections by export or import value, with partner selection and responsive layout.

file:src/design-system/components/InfoTo.name: InfoToggle.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/InfoTo.summary: Small expandable info/help toggle that shows or hides an explanatory text block on click.

file:src/design-system/components/LegalF.name: LegalFooter.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/LegalF.summary: Site-wide legal footer that renders data-source attributions for the current route plus imprint and licensing links.

file:src/design-system/components/Loadin.name: LoadingSpinner.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Loadin.summary: Themed CSS loading spinner shown while async data is being fetched.

file:src/design-system/components/Mobile.name: MobileNav.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Mobile.summary: Mobile slide-out navigation drawer with module entries, theme and language switches, and embedded share controls.

file:src/design-system/components/MultiL.name: MultiLineChart.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/MultiL.summary: SVG dual-line chart plotting export and import trade series over time with hover tooltips and localized axis labels.

file:src/design-system/components/PageHe.name: PageHeader.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/PageHe.summary: Standard page header rendering a title and optional subtitle with consistent design-system typography.

file:src/design-system/components/Pagina.name: Pagination.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Pagina.summary: Pagination control rendering numbered page buttons with ellipsis truncation and previous/next navigation.

file:src/design-system/components/Partne.name: PartnerPicker.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Partne.summary: Dropdown selector for choosing a trade partner country, displaying each partner with localized total trade value.

file:src/design-system/components/Progre.name: ProgressBar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Progre.summary: Multi-segment horizontal progress bar that renders proportional colored segments from a segments definition.

file:src/pages/elections/HistoricalTable.name: HistoricalTable.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/HistoricalTable.summary: Table presenting a district's party vote shares across historical election years, highlighting the winning party per row.

file:src/pages/elections/KreisAutocomple.name: KreisAutocomplete.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/KreisAutocomple.summary: Autocomplete search input for German districts (Kreise) that filters GeoJSON features by name and exposes a reusable hit-filtering helper.

file:src/pages/elections/MapMode.tsx.name: MapMode.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/MapMode.tsx.summary: Map-centric election view orchestrating the choropleth map, metric/type selectors, district search, and the advanced analysis tabs.

file:src/pages/elections/PartyBarChart.t.name: PartyBarChart.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/PartyBarChart.t.summary: Horizontal bar chart rendering a single region's party vote shares for one election year, using shared party colors.

file:src/pages/elections/PartyToggles.ts.name: PartyToggles.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/PartyToggles.ts.summary: Toggle-button group letting users enable or disable individual parties in district charts, with readable text contrast against party colors.

file:src/pages/elections/PercentileBar.t.name: PercentileBar.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/PercentileBar.t.summary: Percentile bar widget positioning a district's value within a min/max range to show relative standing among all districts.

file:src/pages/elections/RadarCompare.ts.name: RadarCompare.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/RadarCompare.ts.summary: Radar chart comparing multiple regions across fixed party-share axes, with localized subject labels.

file:src/pages/elections/AdvancedAnalysi.name: AdvancedAnalysis.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/AdvancedAnalysi.summary: Election analysis dashboard tab hosting scatter plots, ranking tables, and change-over-time visualizations for district (Kreis) election data, with search, region filtering, and gain/loss leaderboards.

file:src/pages/elections/ChangeAnalysisC.name: ChangeAnalysisCharts.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/ChangeAnalysisC.summary: Chart components rendering vote-change analysis: top gains/losses bar charts, a delta histogram, and per-state average change bars for election comparisons.

file:src/pages/elections/ChangeMap.tsx.name: ChangeMap.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/ChangeMap.tsx.summary: Interactive SVG choropleth map coloring districts by vote-share change between two elections, with hover tooltips, zoom-to-region, and a diverging legend.

file:src/pages/elections/CompareMode.tsx.name: CompareMode.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/CompareMode.tsx.summary: Multi-region comparison view that fetches election results for several Kreise and renders side-by-side bar charts, time series, and difference tables.

file:src/pages/elections/DifferenceTable.name: DifferenceTable.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/DifferenceTable.summary: Table comparing per-party vote shares across multiple selected regions, color-coding the spread between min and max values per party.

file:src/pages/elections/DistrictAnalysi.summary: Deep-dive single-district (Kreis) analysis page combining historical tables, party bar charts, percentile bars, and election-type comparison line charts.

file:src/pages/elections/ElectionMap.tsx.name: ElectionMap.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/ElectionMap.tsx.summary: Interactive SVG choropleth of Germany's districts colored by party share or turnout, with hover tooltips, zoom-to-region, and a metric-aware legend.

file:src/pages/elections/RankingTable.ts.name: RankingTable.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/RankingTable.ts.summary: Sortable ranking table listing districts by a metric, deriving the Bundesland (state) from each district's AGS code.

file:src/pages/elections/RegionPanel.tsx.summary: Side panel showing a selected region's election detail: per-party bars, time series across years, and metadata, fetched from the API.

file:src/pages/elections/ScatterPlot.tsx.name: ScatterPlot.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/ScatterPlot.tsx.summary: Configurable scatter plot correlating two district metrics with selectable axes and party/state color modes, plus an interactive color legend.

file:src/pages/elections/TimeSeriesChart.name: TimeSeriesChart.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/TimeSeriesChart.summary: Multi-party line chart plotting vote shares over election years, supporting comparison overlays between regions.

file:src/pages/elections/electionUiUtils.name: electionUiUtils.tsx
file:src/pages/elections/electionUiUtils.summary: Shared UI helpers for the elections module: election-type constants, themed select styling, localized type labels, AGS normalization, and section-title rendering.

file:src/pages/elections/mapColors.ts.name: mapColors.ts
file:src/pages/elections/mapColors.ts.summary: Color-scale functions mapping election metrics (party share, turnout, vote change) to fill colors for choropleth maps.

file:src/pages/elections/mapGeometry.ts.name: mapGeometry.ts
file:src/pages/elections/mapGeometry.ts.summary: GeoJSON projection utilities converting district coordinates into SVG path data and building a lookup map of district geometries.

file:src/pages/elections/normalizeWahlen.name: normalizeWahlen.ts
file:src/pages/elections/normalizeWahlen.summary: Normalization helpers converting raw API election values into display percentages and resolving district display names.

file:src/pages/elections/partyColors.ts.name: partyColors.ts
file:src/pages/elections/partyColors.ts.summary: Central palette and labels for German parties and federal states, with light/dark theme variants and AGS-to-state-color helpers.

file:src/pages/elections/regionBarRows.t.name: regionBarRows.ts
file:src/pages/elections/regionBarRows.t.summary: Helper transforming a region's election row into bar-chart data using shared party colors and normalization utilities.

file:src/pages/elections/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:src/pages/elections/types.ts.summary: Shared TypeScript type definitions for election map rows, distinguishing API-shaped rows from normalized display rows.

file:src/App.tsx.name: App.tsx
file:src/App.tsx.summary: Root application component that wires up React Router with the dashboard layout shell, theme provider, and lazy-loaded routes for every module (elections, Bundestag, legislation, EU law, world map, lobby register, etc.).

file:src/components/bundestag/Abstimmung.name: AbstimmungsDetail.tsx
file:src/components/bundestag/Abstimmung.summary: Renders the detailed breakdown of a single Bundestag vote (Abstimmung), showing each parliamentary group's yes/no/abstain/absent tallies sorted in political left-to-right order with party-derived colors.

file:src/components/bundestag/Abstimmung.name: AbstimmungsListe.tsx
file:src/components/bundestag/Abstimmung.summary: Searchable, paginated list of Bundestag votes (Abstimmungen) that lets the user filter by title and select a poll to inspect in detail.

file:src/components/bundestag/Hemicycle..name: Hemicycle.tsx
file:src/components/bundestag/Hemicycle..summary: Renders the Bundestag seating chart (hemicycle) as an SVG, coloring each seat by party and overlaying per-seat vote results with reveal animation; the project's central parliamentary visualization.

file:src/data/bundestag-seats.ts.name: bundestag-seats.ts
file:src/data/bundestag-seats.ts.summary: Static dataset exporting the raw geometric coordinates and party category for every Bundestag seat (RAW_SEATS) plus the total seat count, used to draw the hemicycle.

file:src/design-system/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:src/design-system/index.ts.summary: Barrel module that re-exports the entire design system: theme context, charts, and all reusable UI components plus their prop types for convenient single-source imports.

file:src/hooks/useSearchParamsState.ts.name: useSearchParamsState.ts
file:src/hooks/useSearchParamsState.ts.summary: Custom React hook that binds a single URL query-string parameter to component state, returning the current value and a setter that updates the search params.

file:src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx.name: DashboardLayout.tsx
file:src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx.summary: Top-level layout shell that renders the sidebar navigation (or mobile nav), derives the active module from the current path, and hosts the routed page content via React Router's Outlet.

file:src/main.tsx.name: main.tsx
file:src/main.tsx.summary: Application bootstrap entry that mounts the App component into the DOM root with React StrictMode and loads global CSS.

file:src/pages/Admin.tsx.name: Admin.tsx
file:src/pages/Admin.tsx.summary: Placeholder admin page rendering a localized page header and phase-placeholder message; a stub awaiting future admin functionality.

file:src/pages/Bundestag.tsx.name: Bundestag.tsx
file:src/pages/Bundestag.tsx.summary: Bundestag page that orchestrates the vote browser: fetches votes, seat distribution, and deputy data via the API, and composes the AbstimmungsListe, AbstimmungsDetail, and Hemicycle components with deep-linkable poll selection.

file:src/pages/Coalition.tsx.name: Coalition.tsx
file:src/pages/Coalition.tsx.summary: Placeholder page for the coalition agreement (Koalitionsvertrag) showing a localized header and phase-placeholder text.

file:src/pages/DemocracyIndex.tsx.name: DemocracyIndex.tsx
file:src/pages/DemocracyIndex.tsx.summary: Placeholder page for the democracy index module displaying a localized header and phase-placeholder message.

file:src/pages/EuParliament.tsx.name: EuParliament.tsx
file:src/pages/EuParliament.tsx.summary: Placeholder page for the EU Parliament module showing a localized header and phase-placeholder text.

file:src/pages/LobbyRegister.tsx.name: LobbyRegister.tsx
file:src/pages/LobbyRegister.tsx.summary: Large, data-rich lobby register page that lists registered lobbying organizations with search and pagination and visualizes aggregate statistics through D3, MapLibre maps, and Recharts charts.

file:src/pages/NotFound.tsx.name: NotFound.tsx
file:src/pages/NotFound.tsx.summary: 404 fallback page rendered for unmatched routes, showing a localized not-found message and a link back to the dashboard.

file:src/pages/Overview.tsx.name: Overview.tsx
file:src/pages/Overview.tsx.summary: Dashboard landing page that fetches headline statistics and latest items across modules (laws, EU law, Bundestag votes) and presents them as stat widgets and data cards with navigation shortcuts.

file:src/components/eulaw/EuCourtCard.ts.name: EuCourtCard.tsx
file:src/components/eulaw/EuCourtCard.ts.summary: Expandable card component rendering a single EU Court of Justice case, lazy-loading full case detail (leitsatz, keywords, linked legal acts) from the API on expand.

file:src/components/eulaw/EuLawCard.tsx.name: EuLawCard.tsx
file:src/components/eulaw/EuLawCard.tsx.summary: Expandable card component for a single EU legal act (regulation/directive/decision), showing type badges, EuroVoc tags, bilingual summaries, and navigation to linked German laws.

file:src/components/eulaw/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:src/components/eulaw/types.ts.summary: TypeScript type definitions for EU-law domain entities: legal-act list items, court cases, detail responses, and linked-law references.

file:src/components/gesetze/GesetzDetail.name: GesetzDetail.tsx
file:src/components/gesetze/GesetzDetail.summary: Detail panel for a single German law, rendering metadata, summary, context, a coloured diff synopsis, linked lobby actors, and related court rulings.

file:src/components/gesetze/UrteilCard.t.name: UrteilCard.tsx
file:src/components/gesetze/UrteilCard.t.summary: Card component for a single German court ruling (Urteil) with collapsible tenor/impact sections, legal-area badges, and links to referenced laws.

file:src/components/gesetze/types.ts.name: types.ts
file:src/components/gesetze/types.ts.summary: TypeScript type definitions for the legislation domain: Gesetz (law) and Urteil (court ruling) record shapes consumed by gesetze components.

file:src/components/gesetze/utils.ts.name: utils.ts
file:src/components/gesetze/utils.ts.summary: Shared helpers for legislation and court data: legal-area classification from law abbreviations, court badge variants, ISO date formatting, and URL/endpoint builders.

file:src/hooks/useApi.ts.name: useApi.ts
file:src/hooks/useApi.ts.summary: Core data-fetching hook that builds API URLs from a configurable base, fetches JSON with abort/retry handling, and exposes data/loading/error/refetch state.

file:src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts.name: useDebouncedValue.ts
file:src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts.summary: Small React hook that returns a debounced copy of a value, updating only after the given delay elapses without changes.

file:src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts.name: useMediaQuery.ts
file:src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts.summary: React hook wrapping matchMedia to track a media query's match state, plus a useIsMobile convenience hook bound to the design-system mobile breakpoint.

file:src/pages/Elections.tsx.name: Elections.tsx
file:src/pages/Elections.tsx.summary: Elections page rendering an interactive district (Kreis) map with autocomplete search, party-result overlays, and theme-aware SVG geometry.

file:src/pages/EuLaw.tsx.name: EuLaw.tsx
file:src/pages/EuLaw.tsx.summary: EU-law page that lists EU legal acts and Court of Justice rulings with filtering, search, pagination, and aggregate counts by type and court.

file:src/pages/Legislation.tsx.name: Legislation.tsx
file:src/pages/Legislation.tsx.summary: Legislation page listing German laws and court rulings with search, filtering, and a master-detail layout that opens GesetzDetail and UrteilCard views.

file:src/pages/WorldMap.tsx.name: WorldMap.tsx
file:src/pages/WorldMap.tsx.summary: Interactive MapLibre world-map page rendering country-level indicators with projection switching, floating widget panels, and Safari/globe capability detection.

file:src/utils/worldFilters.ts.name: worldFilters.ts
file:src/utils/worldFilters.ts.summary: Small predicate helpers for world-map data filtering: detecting real countries and checking for World Bank region presence across rows.

file:src/data/sourcesCatalog.ts.name: sourcesCatalog.ts
file:src/data/sourcesCatalog.ts.summary: Static catalog mapping each dashboard page to its curated list of data sources, plus a helper that derives the footer source-line i18n key from a route pathname.

file:src/design-system/components/Compar.name: CompareBar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Compar.summary: Design-system component rendering a labeled horizontal comparison bar for country vs. region vs. world values with a configurable value formatter.

file:src/design-system/components/LineCh.name: LineChart.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/LineCh.summary: Interactive SVG line chart with optional area fill, gridlines, annotations, and a hover tooltip that tracks the cursor across data points.

file:src/design-system/components/MonoLa.name: MonoLabel.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/MonoLa.summary: Small design-system primitive rendering uppercase monospaced label text styled from the active theme tokens.

file:src/design-system/components/Percen.name: PercentileBar.tsx
file:src/design-system/components/Percen.summary: Design-system component visualizing a percentile value as a filled bar with optional inversion and a localized footer caption.

file:src/design-system/i18n.ts.name: i18n.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n.ts.summary: Aggregating i18n barrel that merges the per-feature DE/EN message modules into unified dictionaries and provides the placeholder interpolation helper.

file:src/design-system/i18n/common.ts.name: common.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/common.ts.summary: Shared DE/EN translation dictionaries for cross-cutting UI labels (navigation, common actions, shared components) used across the dashboard.

file:src/design-system/i18n/elections.ts.name: elections.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/elections.ts.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the elections feature labels and copy.

file:src/design-system/i18n/eu.ts.name: eu.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/eu.ts.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the EU law feature (legislation, court rulings, and related UI copy).

file:src/design-system/i18n/gesetze.ts.name: gesetze.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/gesetze.ts.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the German legislation (Gesetze) feature labels and descriptions.

file:src/design-system/i18n/lobby.ts.name: lobby.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/lobby.ts.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the lobby register feature labels and explanatory copy.

file:src/design-system/i18n/overview.ts.name: overview.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/overview.ts.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the dashboard overview/landing page labels.

file:src/design-system/i18n/sources.ts.name: sources.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/sources.ts.summary: DE/EN translation dictionaries for the data Sources page labels, captions, and footer source lines.

file:src/design-system/i18n/world.ts.name: world.ts
file:src/design-system/i18n/world.ts.summary: Largest DE/EN translation dictionary covering the world map feature, including country indicators, metric labels, and map UI copy.

file:src/pages/Sources.tsx.name: Sources.tsx
file:src/pages/Sources.tsx.summary: Sources page that lists each dashboard feature's curated data sources, combining the static sources catalog with live API-reported worldmap sources and their freshness and value counts.

pipeline:.github/workflows/ci.yml.name: ci.yml
pipeline:.github/workflows/ci.yml.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow triggered on push to main and on every pull request, running TypeScript typecheck, production build, and lint as quality gates.

step:.github/workflows/ci.yml:build.name: build
step:.github/workflows/ci.yml:build.summary: The 'Typecheck, build, lint' job on ubuntu-latest: checks out the repo, sets up Node 20, installs dependencies with npm ci, runs the production build, then runs lint informationally.

document:README.md.name: README.md
document:README.md.summary: Primary project documentation (in German) covering the tech stack, all SPA routes/pages, the design system, API conventions, and the local development and deploy workflow for the Res.Publica Dashboard.

file:deploy.sh.name: deploy.sh
file:deploy.sh.summary: Bash deploy script that pulls the latest main branch, installs dependencies with npm ci, and runs the production Vite build into the Nginx-served dist directory.

file:index.html.name: index.html
file:index.html.summary: Vite HTML entry document providing the #root mount point, Google Fonts preconnect/stylesheet links, favicon, and the module script tag that bootstraps the React app from src/main.tsx.

config:package.json.name: package.json
config:package.json.summary: NPM manifest defining the dev/build/lint/preview scripts and pinning runtime dependencies (React, react-router-dom, d3, recharts, maplibre-gl) and the TypeScript/Vite/ESLint dev toolchain.

config:tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:tsconfig.json.summary: Root TypeScript solution-style config that holds no files of its own and delegates to the tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json project references.

config:tsconfig.app.json.name: tsconfig.app.json
config:tsconfig.app.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the application source under src/, enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution, react-jsx, and ES2020 target with DOM libs.

config:tsconfig.node.json.name: tsconfig.node.json
config:tsconfig.node.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration scoped to the Node-side build tooling (vite.config.ts), targeting ES2022 with strict linting and bundler module resolution.

file:.cursorrules.name: .cursorrules
file:.cursorrules.summary: Cursor AI editor rules file defining project conventions and coding guidelines for AI-assisted development in the Res.Publica dashboard repository.

file:.understand-anything/.understandign.name: .understandignore
file:.understand-anything/.understandign.summary: Ignore-pattern file for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, excluding build artifacts, dependencies, and generated files from knowledge-graph scanning.

config:.understand-anything/config.json.name: config.json
config:.understand-anything/config.json.summary: Minimal configuration for the Understand-Anything plugin, setting the output language for generated analysis content.

file:eslint.config.js.name: eslint.config.js
file:eslint.config.js.summary: ESLint flat config wiring up TypeScript, React Hooks, and React Refresh rules for linting the dashboard source tree.

document:notes/BUG8-gesetz-titel-TODO.md.name: BUG8-gesetz-titel-TODO.md
document:notes/BUG8-gesetz-titel-TODO.md.summary: Developer TODO note documenting a UX bug where the legislation list view shows raw file identifiers instead of human-readable display titles, with the open decision and implementation steps.

file:public/data/world.geojson.name: world.geojson
file:public/data/world.geojson.summary: GeoJSON dataset of world country boundaries served as a static asset, used by the MapLibre world map to render political-data choropleths.

file:src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts.name: useLocalStorage.ts
file:src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts.summary: Custom React hook that persists a state value to localStorage, hydrating from storage on mount and writing back on every update.

file:src/hooks/useOffsetPagination.ts.name: useOffsetPagination.ts
file:src/hooks/useOffsetPagination.ts.summary: Custom React hook providing offset-based pagination state (page, limit, computed offset) with page-setting and reset helpers for paginated API list views.

file:src/index.css.name: index.css
file:src/index.css.summary: Global base stylesheet imported by the application entry point, establishing root-level CSS resets and baseline styling for the SPA.

file:src/vite-env.d.ts.name: vite-env.d.ts
file:src/vite-env.d.ts.summary: TypeScript ambient declaration file referencing Vite client types so that import.meta.env and asset imports are correctly typed across the project.

file:ui_kits/dashboard/ConsoleComponents.name: ConsoleComponents.jsx
file:ui_kits/dashboard/ConsoleComponents.summary: Standalone UI-kit prototype defining reusable themed visualization primitives (sparklines, line/radar charts, KPI tiles, percentile and comparison bars) for the Country Console, exposed as globals on window.

file:ui_kits/dashboard/CountryConsole.js.name: CountryConsole.jsx
file:ui_kits/dashboard/CountryConsole.js.summary: Large standalone Country Console prototype assembling indicator formatting helpers and a global ranking view from country statistics, building on the ConsoleComponents UI primitives.

file:vite.config.ts.name: vite.config.ts
file:vite.config.ts.summary: Vite build configuration registering the React plugin and project-level build/dev-server options for the dashboard SPA.
